drop-a-matching-marker-file-onto-a-loade.feature: Drop a matching marker file onto a loaded clip
drop-a-matching-marker-file-onto-a-loade.scenario: Markers are replaced when a matching sidecar is dropped
steps: Given a video is loaded with in-progress marker state
And a sidecar file exists in the same folder with saved markers
When the user drops the JSON file onto the app window
Then the video does not change
And all current in-memory markers are replaced with those from the sidecar

drop-a-matching-marker-file-onto-a-loade.feature: Drop a matching marker file onto a loaded clip
steps: Given a sidecar file is loaded over in-progress markers
When the user dispatches undo
Then the markers revert to the state directly before loading

drop-a-matching-marker-file-onto-a-loade.feature: Drop a matching marker file onto a loaded clip
drop-a-matching-marker-file-onto-a-loade.scenario: No sibling video found results in silent error
steps: Given a JSON file is dropped with no sibling video next to it
When the app tries to resolve the sibling
Then the error is logged silently
And the current state is unchanged

drop-a-matching-marker-file-onto-a-loade.feature: Drop a matching marker file onto a loaded clip
drop-a-matching-marker-file-onto-a-loade.scenario: A different sibling video loads with its markers
steps: Given a JSON file is dropped whose sibling video differs from the currently loaded one
When the sidecar is resolved
Then the sibling video loads replacing the current video
And the sibling's markers are applied

region-creation::3855ff5e.scenario: New region size is the smaller of 10% of view or 5 seconds
steps: Given the current viewport span is <viewSpan> seconds
When a new region is created
Then the region span is <expectedSpan> seconds

region-creation::50730318.scenario: New region from the timeline is is aligned on the cursor position
steps: Given the current viewport span is 40 seconds
And the video duration is 120 seconds
When a new region is created at cursor position 60 seconds
Then the region spans from 60 to 64 seconds

region-creation::7c76059f.scenario: New region from the region list is aligned on the playhead
steps: Given the current viewport span is 40 seconds
And the video duration is 120 seconds
When a new region is created at playhead position 60 seconds
Then the region spans from 60 to 64 seconds

region-creation::1cd7c8b4.scenario: Region is clamped to the start of the video
steps: Given the current viewport span is 40 seconds
And the video duration is 120 seconds
When a new region is created at cursor position -0.5 seconds
Then the region in-point is 0

region-creation::9e815d8d.scenario: Region is clamped to the end of the video
steps: Given the current viewport span is 40 seconds
And the video duration is 120 seconds
When a new region is created at cursor position 119.5 seconds
Then the region out-point is 120

video-loading::95a00249.scenario: Viewport is set to the video duration on load
steps: When a video is loaded
Then the viewport changes to the length of the video

video-loading::8d77b3e0.scenario: Viewport resets when a different video is loaded
steps: Given a first video with a long duration is already loaded
When a second video with a shorter duration is loaded
Then the viewport changes to the shorter video's duration
